food_items.name: Chicken Kacchi Biryani
food_items.description: Aromatic basmati rice slow-cooked with tender marinated chicken, potato, and direct hillside spices.

food_items.name: Spicy Beef Bhuna
food_items.description: Tender chunks of beef dry-cooked with thick caramelized onions, ginger, garlic, and special Pahari hot peppers.

food_items.name: Smoky Chicken Grilled Platter
food_items.description: Full quarter chicken marinated in local herbs, charred to charcoal perfection, served with house salad and mint sauce.

food_items.name: Traditional Pahari Bamboo Chicken
food_items.description: Exquisite tribal delicacy - chicken pieces stuffed in raw bamboo shoots with hill herbs and slow-cooked over firewood.

food_items.name: Pahari Ruhi Fish Fry
food_items.description: Fresh river Ruhi fish coated in crispy turmeric-chili crust, shallow fried with mustard oil and green chilies.

food_items.name: Butter Paratha with Egg Bhurji
food_items.description: Multi-layered crispy paratha pan-fried in pure ghee, served with double egg scrambled with spices.

food_items.name: Chilled Sweet Mango Lassi
food_items.description: Thick creamy yogurt blended with sweet ripe mangoes and saffron essence.

food_items.name: Hill Country Lemon Sherbet
food_items.description: Freshly squeezed hill lime juice served with mint, black salt, and absolute cold splash.
